task: place the black bowl in the dish rack
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A blue bowl sits on a wooden table next to a blue dish rack. The bowl is rigid with a curved rim; the dish rack has multiple slots. STRATEGY - reach the bowl at its rim for a stable grasp, lift and transport above the dish rack, then place into an empty slot. Failure modes include dropping the bowl or misaligning it with the dish rack slots. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach bowl rim; Step 2 grasp rim for secure hold; Step 3 transport above dish rack; Step 4 lower into an empty slot.

Goal: inside(black_bowl, dish_rack); stable(black_bowl)
Scene: black_bowl, dish_rack, table
Step 1: reach(black_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the black bowl
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, black_bowl, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, black_bowl) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(black_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the black bowl
  contact: holding(black_bowl) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(black_bowl)
Step 3: transport(black_bowl -> dish_rack)
  affordance_region: an empty slot in the dish rack
  spatial: above(black_bowl, dish_rack, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(black_bowl)
  done_when: above(black_bowl, dish_rack, 0.05)
Step 4: place(black_bowl -> dish_rack)
  affordance_region: an empty slot in the dish_rack
  contact: surface_contact(black_bowl, dish_rack) [completion]; released(black_bowl) [completion]
  pose: stable(black_bowl) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(black_bowl, dish_rack) AND released(black_bowl)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the rim of the black bowl
the rim of the black bowl
an empty slot in the dish rack
an empty slot in the dish_rack
